# Gilfoyle — History

## Core Context

- **Project:** Squad-SpecKit Bridge

## Learnings

### 2025-07-19: Framework Comparison Analysis

Squad and Spec Kit are complementary layers, not competitors.
Squad handles runtime orchestration. Spec Kit handles planning pipeline.

- Complementary architecture layers reduce friction
- State accumulation needs automatic pruning
